analysis.consistency: The feature name, slug, and class ('Druid Circle', 'druid-druid-circle', 'druid') are consistent with standard D&D 5e feature naming conventions for a core class feature.
analysis.quality: High. The description clearly explains the mechanical impact: selection occurs at 2nd level, identifies the subclass ('circle of druids'), and establishes the progression points (2nd, 6th, 10th, 14th levels). The inclusion of a direct link reference ('#section-druid-circles') suggests good internal document linking.

mechanics.impact: Establishes the player's Druid subclass (Circle) and gates subsequent subclass features.
